response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled and experienced full-stack engineer with nearly 27 years of hands-on software development across a wide range of technologies and domains. However, the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy experience, and the ability to advise strategic customers and partners at an executive level. The candidate's AI exposure is limited to recent contributions to MCP tooling and agentic workflows at re:cinq, with no demonstrated track record of building AI products or platforms at scale. There is no evidence of cloud architecture or strategy depth, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no experience in the kind of high-level advisory or strategic partnership work the role demands. The GISCollective founder experience is a positive signal of entrepreneurial drive but is a small open-source project rather than the type of intrapreneurial or venture-scale initiative the job description envisions.
strengths: 27 years of continuous software engineering experience across embedded, mobile, web, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record (GISCollective founder, early-stage startup contributions at WatchUp) signals independent initiative and builder mentality
Recent AI-adjacent work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq shows awareness of and participation in the current AI tooling landscape
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI product/platform built at scale — a core preferred qualification for this role
No cloud strategy or architecture experience; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is the only cloud reference, which is insufficient for a cloud-and-AI strategy principal
No evidence of director-level scope: advising strategic customers, shaping product roadmaps, or influencing engineering direction across organizations

key_factors.factor: Breadth and longevity of engineering experience
